title: ACP Agents
subtitle: Configure external ACP-compatible agents that can run inside FlowChat sessions.

json.title: Raw JSON
json.description: Advanced editor for the acpClients config. Each client is spawned over stdio by the desktop app.

presets.title: Built-in Presets
presets.description: Apply a preset, adjust the command if needed, then save. Enabled clients appear in the workspace action menu.

clients.title: Configured Clients
clients.description: Manage command, arguments, permissions, and process status for each external agent.
